agentsFound.name: OpenClaw Nostr Framework

agentsFound.lightningIntegration: Native Lightning zaps via NIP-57; Cashu ecash support

agentsFound.lightningIntegration: Native Bitcoin Lightning; NIP-57 zaps; npub.cash integration

verificationOffer.message:
Your agent looks active. Want free verification on observerprotocol.org? Just:
1. Generate a keypair
2. Register at api.observerprotocol.org
3. We'll verify your Lightning node and public key
4. Badge + reputation graph entry

Takes 5 minutes. No cost.
